title: Why Spreadsheets Break When You Manage Multiple Client Projects
description: Once you're juggling 3+ client projects, spreadsheets stop working. Here's the visibility problem freelance developers face — and how a project-first workspace like IndieDesk fixes it.

title: IndieDesk – Why I Built a Self-Hosted Laravel Project Workspace
description: Why I built IndieDesk, a self-hosted Laravel project workspace template designed for indie developers who want full control over their projects, costs and billing without SaaS lock-in.

title: Network Analyzer Project
description: A complete video tutorial and setup on how I built a custom network analyzer using tcpdump and other open-source tools on Linux. This article explains the logic, shows real output and practical use cases.
